calendar.matters: Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Petitioner Nicole M. Angiuli To Stay Proceedings
Cross Petition Of Salvatore Cortara To Petition Of Nicole M. Angiuli For Instructions Concerning The Butterfield Trust

Petition For Instructions: 1. Instructing Trustee To Fund The Fabio A. Cortara Trust Ii
Off Calendar May-18-2026 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion To Compel Nicole Angiuli To Provide Further Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents, And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar May-06-2026 Text Ruling

Petition For Instructions: 1. Instructing Trustee To Fund The Fabio A. Cortara Trust Ii
Off Calendar Mar-09-2026 Continued To May-18-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Instructions: 1. Instructing Trustee To Fund The Fabio A. Cortara Trust Ii
Off Calendar Dec-29-2025 Continued To Mar-09-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Michael Freedman for petitioner Nicole Angiuli (via Zoom).
Thomas LaLanne for objector Salvatore Cortara (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on the petition for instructions directing the trustee to fund the Fabio E. Cortara Trust.

Mr. LaLanne stated that Salvatore Cortara objected to the petition and that a written objection would be filed.

Mr. Freedman noted that no written objection had yet been filed and stated that the petitioner would respond once objections were reduced to writing. He further noted that related proceedings were pending in another jurisdiction.

After discussion, the Court continued the matter to March 9, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. The Court ordered that any written objections be filed on or before January 15, 2026, and that any responses be filed on or before February 27, 2026. The Court stated that failure to timely file objections would be deemed a waiver.

The Court discussed the possibility of mediation and encouraged the parties to consider resolution after briefing is complete.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

Petition For Instructions: 1. Instructing Trustee To Fund The Fabio A. Cortara Trust Ii
Off Calendar Dec-22-2025 Continued To Dec-29-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
